name: Playlist backup for YouTube
description: If you like organizing YouTube videos into playlists and watching them later, this app is for you. You can back up playlists from multiple accounts. The app lets you search across all playlists and filter by video name, even showing original titles for videos that have become private or deleted. Playlists are downloaded only when you're ready to back them up. The interface is straightforward, no unnecessary content is loaded from YouTube, just your playlists. Enjoy!
